headline: Nvidia AI first agent baseline — entity not currently in ai-labs index. Distinct from Nvidia-as-Fortune-500: Nvidia AI captures the GPU/CUDA/NIM-microservices stack that constitutes systemic infrastructure for the entire Pentagon classified AI cohort. Signed Pentagon classified IL6/IL7 agreement May 1 2026 directly. ALSO primary investor in Reflection AI ($1B+ initial round), structurally linking Nvidia to the cohort member with weakest accountability posture. NIM microservices certified for classified deployment. Distinguishers: (1) infrastructure-enabler role amplifies cohort-wide accountability gap (CUDA/NIM/H200/B200 deployed across all 8 cohort members); (2) Jensen Huang public statements supporting AI in defense applications; (3) no published AI-safety policy specific to military/classified deployments; (4) August 2026 EU AI Act GPAI provider enforcement applies (Nvidia is a GPAI provider via NIM). First baseline placement: Developing band, composite 25.0, reflecting partial AI-safety posture (NeMo Guardrails published, model-card commitment to NIM microservices) offset by classified-deployment + Reflection investment + infrastructure-enabler role. Recommend first-baseline placement at composite 25.0.
key_evidence: May 1 2026: Nvidia signed Pentagon classified IL6/IL7 AI agreement; CUDA/NIM stack certified for classified-network deployment.
October 2025: Nvidia led $1B funding round in Reflection AI; expanded with 1789 Capital to $2B at $8B valuation in October 2025 — structurally links Nvidia to weakest-accountability cohort member.
Nvidia NIM microservices and NeMo Guardrails published — partial AI-safety posture exists (positive signal).
GPU supply chain serves all Pentagon classified cohort members (Microsoft, Google, OpenAI, AWS, SpaceX, Oracle, Reflection) plus Anthropic — infrastructure-enabler role.
EU AI Act GPAI provider enforcement activates August 2 2026 (fines up to €35M or 7% global turnover) — Nvidia NIM is GPAI in scope.
No published AI-safety policy specific to military/classified deployments; CUDA EULA permits broad downstream use without entity-level boundary on weaponization or surveillance applications.

evidence.finding: Nvidia confirmed as classified IL6/IL7 signatory; hardware + NIM stack on classified networks.

evidence.source: Bloomberg — Nvidia, 1789 Capital Invest in Reflection AI
evidence.finding: Nvidia primary backer of Reflection AI; structurally links Nvidia to weakest-accountability cohort member.

evidence.source: US Department of War — Classified Networks AI Agreements
evidence.finding: Primary-source DoD release confirming Nvidia among 8 IL6/IL7 vendors.

evidence.source: Lawyer Monthly — EU AI Act delay
evidence.finding: GPAI provider enforcement still activates August 2 2026; high-risk provisions delayed to December 2027.

scoring_rationale.AWR: 2.0 developing. A1 detection partially functional via published NeMo Guardrails framework; A4 amplification compromised by infrastructure-enabler role spanning entire Pentagon cohort without aggregated harm-signal mechanism.
scoring_rationale.EMP: 2.0 developing. E1 affective resonance: Nvidia public posture acknowledges societal AI implications but operationalization at GPU/NIM layer is empathy-thin (boundary set by EULA, not by infrastructure-design).
scoring_rationale.ACT: 2.0 developing. AC2 proportionality compromised by infrastructure-enabler scale (every classified-cohort harm pathway runs on Nvidia stack); AC4 response: NIM microservices safety-feature releases counted as response, but no entity-level military-deployment incident-response framework.
scoring_rationale.EQU: 2.0 developing. EQ2 distributional awareness: GPU access concentrates AI-development capability among well-funded actors; export controls partially address geopolitical equity but domestic equity (small-developer access) compromised.
scoring_rationale.BND: 2.0 developing. B3 scope clarity: CUDA EULA permits broad downstream use; classified-deployment opt-in without published restriction on autonomous weapons / domestic mass surveillance is BND-erosive. B5 consent: infrastructure-layer consent framework absent.
scoring_rationale.ACC: 2.0 developing. AB2 transparency: NeMo Guardrails and model-card support partial; no published AI-safety policy specific to military/classified deployments. AB4 reparation undefined for cohort-wide harm pathways.
scoring_rationale.SYS: 2.0 developing. S1 causal reasoning at infrastructure layer is the central question for Nvidia AI; entity has not articulated systemic-harm-pathway analysis at GPU/NIM layer despite enabling all classified-cohort deployments.
scoring_rationale.INT: 2.0 developing. I1 consistency: 'AI safety' marketing posture contradicted by Reflection investment + classified-deployment opt-in without published guardrails; I2 non-performance: gap between NeMo Guardrails framework and operational deployment is wide.

math_check.validator_check: First baseline. Composite 25.0. Developing band (just above critical-band threshold of 20). No floor designation — partial AI-safety infrastructure (NeMo Guardrails, model card support) provides positive offset to classified-deployment + Reflection-investment negatives.

negativeSignals: Pentagon classified IL6/IL7 cohort participation; primary backer of Reflection AI (weakest-accountability cohort member); CUDA EULA permits broad downstream use including weaponization-adjacent; infrastructure-enabler role amplifies cohort-wide accountability gap; no published military-deployment-specific AI-safety policy.
positiveSignals: NeMo Guardrails framework published; NIM microservices include model-card support; export controls partially address geopolitical AI-access equity; ASML/TSMC supply-chain governance functional; Jensen Huang public posture acknowledges AI societal implications.
sector_context: AI Labs / Pentagon classified cohort + AI infrastructure cluster. Nvidia AI distinguished by infrastructure-enabler role (every other cohort member depends on Nvidia stack) and structural linkage to Reflection AI (weakest accountability). Cross-reference: Microsoft (Pentagon cohort, Nadella testimony pending), Google DeepMind (cohort + UK research base), Amazon AWS AI (cohort + math-hygiene flag).
open_actions_resolved: First baseline established with developing-band placement
Reflection AI investment structural linkage absorbed
open_actions_carried: Watch: August 2 2026 EU AI Act GPAI enforcement activation impact on NIM/Nemotron
Watch: any classified-deployment harm or incident report
Watch: NeMo Guardrails operationalization at customer deployment scale
Watch: Nvidia entity-level military-deployment AI-safety policy publication
Watch: Reflection AI accountability evolution (Nvidia governance leverage)
